summary: Comprehensive e2e testing completed for Avantra Chemicals multipage website. All backend APIs (22 tests) passed. All frontend features tested and working correctly including Homepage, Products, Product Detail with multilingual content, Contact form, Dealer form, Admin panel with CRUD operations, and language switching (EN/TE/KN/HI). Mobile responsive design verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Products page shows 33 products (31 seeded + 2 test products from backend tests) - consider cleaning up TEST_ prefixed products after test runs
seed_data_creation: Database seeded with 31 products with multilingual content (EN, TE, KN, HI)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features are working. Test products (TEST_ prefixed) may exist in database from automated tests. Admin panel accessible at /admin with password 'avantra2024'. Static dealer map is intentional (no Google Maps integration).

homepage.details: Hero section, featured products carousel, stats section, testimonials, CTA buttons all working

products_page.details: 33 products displayed, category filters work (All, Biostimulants, etc.), search functionality works

product_detail.details: Product info, composition table, how it works, growth stages, dosage, advantages sections all display correctly with multilingual content

language_switcher.details: All 4 languages work: English, Telugu, Kannada, Hindi. Content changes correctly on switch

contact_form.details: Form submission works, data saved to database, form clears after submit

dealer_form.details: Form submission works, data saved to database, form clears after submit

admin_login.details: Password 'avantra2024' works, wrong password rejected with 401

admin_products.details: View, Add, Edit, Delete products all working

responsive_design.details: Mobile view works with hamburger menu, proper layout

navbar_navigation.details: All nav links work (Home, About, Products, Dealers, Contact)
